MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,683.00 FILED BY CANRIGHT, KATHLEEN BURNEY CANRIGHT, WILLIAM G. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBBE JONES JOINERY MENDONCA, GUSTAVO M. AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY JONES, MOSES CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY, AND GUSTAVO M. MENDONCA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-25-2012 AT 8:30AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANRIGHT, KATHLEEN BURNEY CANRIGHT, WILLIAM G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBBE JONES JOINERY JONES, MOSES CHRISTIAN $1,317.44 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,394.94, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY AND GUSTAVO MENDONCA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MOSES CHRISTIAN
